PROJECT: smarter

# Apply the tomorrow curation->room mechanic to smarter's NEGOTIATION rooms, and
# port the constraint-frontier / remediation-preview mechanic into negotiation
# leverage. Smarter already has server/api/warroom/* (incl. bridge.post.ts),
# server/utils/positionEngine.ts (the position-engine parity port), and
# components/WarRoomLeverage.vue — REUSE them. Both tasks are ADDITIVE (new files;
# do NOT edit bridge.post.ts) so they can run in parallel without conflict. Prod
# build (nuxt build) is the merge gate; smarter has no test script, so proof is a
# green build (add a test file if a vitest config exists, but the gate is the build).

- id: smarter-signal-room-bridge
  title: Auto-open/annotate a negotiation room from a monitored signal breach
  material: yes
  model: sonnet
  depends: []
  proof: `npm run build` exits 0
  prompt: |
    Mirror tomorrow's curation->war-room bridge for smarter contract negotiation.
    Add a PURE server/utils/signalRoomBridge.ts exporting
    buildRoomFromSignal(signal, position) that, when a monitored contract/portfolio
    signal breaches a threshold (e.g. a clause-risk or renewal/expiry or leverage
    signal), produces a negotiation-room spec pre-loaded with the recommended
    position from server/utils/positionEngine.ts. Add a NEW endpoint
    server/api/warroom/signal-bridge.post.ts that opens/annotates a room via the
    SAME room-creation path bridge.post.ts uses (reuse it; do NOT edit bridge.post.ts).
    Smallest diff, additive. Material: creates rooms. Keep the prod build green.
    CANDIDATE-SHARED: signalRoomBridge mirrors tomorrow curationBridge.

- id: smarter-negotiation-frontier
  title: Rank leverage/concession moves by outcome-weighted improvement
  material: no
  model: sonnet
  depends: []
  proof: `npm run build` exits 0
  prompt: |
    Port the constraint-frontier / remediation-preview mechanic into negotiation
    leverage. Add a PURE server/utils/negotiationFrontier.ts exporting
    rankLeverageMoves(position, candidateMoves) that scores each concession/leverage
    move by acceptance-probability-weighted outcome improvement, REUSING the
    positionEngine.ts weakness ledger + tenability signals. Add a read-only endpoint
    server/api/warroom/frontier.post.ts and surface the ranked moves in
    components/WarRoomLeverage.vue (smallest additive edit — new panel section, do
    not restructure the component). Keep the prod build green. CANDIDATE-SHARED:
    negotiationFrontier mirrors tomorrow constraintFrontier — extract to a shared
    package later.

OPERATOR:
  - Confirm the smarter monitored-signal source (which clause/portfolio signals trigger signal-room-bridge) and any threshold policy before enabling in prod.
